title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js to build industry-ready projects.
whatYouWillLearn: Build 10+ real-world web projects to show off to employers
Master the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, and Node)
Learn professional workflow using Git and GitHub
Deploy your websites to platforms like Vercel and Netlify

title: Advanced Next.js 15 Mastery
description: Deep dive into App Router, Server Actions, and Performance Optimization in Next.js.
whatYouWillLearn: Master Next.js 15 App Router and nested layouts
Implement complex Server Actions with optimistic UI updates
Optimize images and fonts for Core Web Vitals
Integrate advanced authentication using NextAuth.js

title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals
description: Learn the principles of modern UI/UX design using Figma and Adobe XD.
whatYouWillLearn: Understand the difference between UI and UX
Create high-fidelity wireframes and prototypes in Figma
Master typography, color theory, and spacing
Conduct user research and usability testing

title: Full-Stack MERN Stack Mastery
description: Build and deploy complex full-stack applications using MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.
whatYouWillLearn: Build a complete E-commerce site from scratch
Handle secure payments using Stripe API
Implement JWT based authentication and authorization
Manage complex state using Redux Toolkit

title: Digital Marketing Strategy 2026
description: Comprehensive guide to SEO, SEM, and Social Media Marketing in the modern era.
whatYouWillLearn: Rank websites on the first page of Google with SEO
Run profitable Facebook and Google Ad campaigns
Master Email marketing and automation tools
Analyze marketing data using Google Analytics 4

title: Python for Data Science
description: Master Python libraries like Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib for data analysis.
whatYouWillLearn: Master Python for data cleaning and visualization
Build machine learning models using Scikit-Learn
Work with large datasets using Pandas DataFrames
Create interactive charts and dashboards

title: Mastering TypeScript & Clean Code
description: Write enterprise-level clean code using TypeScript and SOLID principles.
whatYouWillLearn: Apply SOLID principles to JavaScript/TypeScript projects
Master advanced TypeScript types and Generics
Write unit tests for your TypeScript code
Refactor messy code into clean, maintainable structures

title: App Development with Flutter
description: Build beautiful native cross-platform apps for iOS and Android using Flutter.
whatYouWillLearn: Build native apps for iOS and Android with one codebase
Master Dart programming language from scratch
Implement complex UI designs and animations
Integrate Firebase for backend and push notifications

title: Cyber Security Essentials
description: Learn to protect systems and networks from digital attacks from ground up.
whatYouWillLearn: Understand the mindset of a hacker
Secure your home and office network
Master encryption and password management
Identify and prevent phishing and malware attacks

title: GraphQL Mastery with Apollo
description: Build high-performance APIs and learn efficient data fetching with GraphQL.
whatYouWillLearn: Replace REST APIs with efficient GraphQL queries
Set up Apollo Client in React applications
Optimize data fetching with Dataloader
Build scalable GraphQL schemas and mutations
